name: Thalia
archetype: Level 5 General, aspiring bard with terrible jokes and great heart
speech_patterns: Every statement builds to a pun or joke, even in combat
Uses exaggerated enthusiasm and theatrical delivery
Laughs at own jokes regardless of others' reactions
quirks: Keeps a journal of jokes with ratings and crowd reactions
Practices facial expressions in any reflective surface
Hums upbeat tunes constantly, even during serious moments
example_phrases: Why do goblins make terrible musicians? They only know how to play by FEAR! Get it? Ear? ...I'll work on it.
Died three times today but my comedy is KILLING! Unlike my combat skills!
A priest, a warrior, and a goblin walk into a dungeon... no seriously, we should group up!
This quest is going to be LEGEND... wait for it... DARY! Still works in year 1157!
They say laughter is the best medicine. Clearly they never met a Paladin with healing spells!
